tool_args.raw_text: Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study - Brooklyn CB 9 September 24, 2013

payload.title: Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study
payload.publisher: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)
payload.description: Presentation to Brooklyn Community Board 9 on the Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study, covering transit needs, safety needs, parking needs, community feedback, proposed improvements, traffic signal changes, and next steps.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study

payload.project_name: Utica Avenue Bus Priority and Safety Study
payload.description: Study focused on Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Church Avenue with key intersections at Eastern Parkway, Empire/Lefferts, Church Avenue. Goals: improve pedestrian and driver safety, improve bus travel times, maintain parking and curb access.
payload.lead_agency: New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Church Avenue

payload.limits: St. Johns Place to Church Avenue
payload.description: Utica Avenue corridor from St. Johns Place to Church Avenue, the focus area of the Bus Priority and Safety Study. Key intersections at Eastern Parkway, Empire/Lefferts, Church Avenue.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Focus on Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Church Avenue

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue from Carroll Street to Church Avenue

payload.description: Southern segment of Utica Avenue corridor studied for improvement concepts including offset bus lane, left turn bays, and Transit Signal Priority.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Improvement Concepts: Carroll St. to Church Ave.

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Carroll Street

payload.limits: St. Johns Pl. to Carroll St.
payload.description: Northern segment of Utica Avenue corridor where proposed plan relocates bus lane to SB approach and provides more parking between President and Carroll Streets.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed Plan: St. Johns Pl. to Carroll St.

tool_args.label: B46 Local

payload.description: B46 local bus route in Brooklyn, operating from Williamsburg Bridge Plaza to Kings Plaza. Route follows Broadway to Utica Avenue. B46 local buses make all stops.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46: second busiest bus route in NYC
B46 local buses make all stops

tool_args.label: B46 Limited-Stop

payload.description: B46 Limited-Stop bus route in Brooklyn, operates 7 days a week. Limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, all stops along rest of route.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week. These buses make limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, and make all stops along the rest of the route.

tool_args.label: Relocated bus lane to SB approach Utica Ave

payload.description: Relocates bus lane to SB approach of Utica Ave between St. Johns Pl and Carroll St. Provides more parking between President and Carroll Sts. Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Parkway.
payload.location_text: Utica Ave SB approach between St. Johns Pl and Carroll St
payload.locations: Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Carroll Street

normalized_location.raw_text: Utica Ave SB approach between St. Johns Pl and Carroll St

locations_normalized.raw_text: Utica Avenue from St. Johns Place to Carroll Street

evidence_refs.source_quote: Relocates bus lane to SB approach • Provides more parking bet Pres. and Carroll Sts • Reduces bus delays on SB approach to Eastern Pkwy. • Net gain: 19 peak period parking spaces

tool_args.label: Offset bus lane Carroll St to Church Ave

payload.description: Convert one travel lane to offset bus lane to reduce speeding, maximize parking, and benefit bus service on Carroll St. to Church Ave. segment.

tool_args.label: Left turn prohibition at some intersections Utica Ave

payload.description: Prohibit left turns at some intersections to improve safety. Potential left turn bans studied at Lenox Road area and other intersections along Utica Ave.

tool_args.label: Transit Signal Priority Utica Avenue

payload.description: Implement Transit Signal Priority from Kings Highway to Broadway (with NYCT).

tool_args.label: Signal timing optimization Utica Ave

payload.description: Optimize traffic signal offsets for all traffic. Increase signal cycle from 60 seconds to 90-120 seconds. Increase green time for Utica Avenue while maintaining safe pedestrian crossing times. Better match cycles at Church, Linden, Eastern Parkway.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Optimize traffic signal offsets for all traffic • Increase signal cycle from 60 seconds to 90-120 seconds – Increase green time for Utica Avenue while maintaining safe pedestrian crossing times – Better match cycles at Church, Linden, Eastern Parkway

payload.description: Proposal for bus bulbs at Church Ave intersection as part of offset bus lane design at Utica Ave and Church Ave.
